nasb.text: Now on the day when his sons and his daughters were eating and drinking wine in their oldest brother’s house,

esv.text: Now there was a day when his sons and daughters were eating and drinking wine in their oldest brother’s house,

cnv.text: 有一天，約伯的兒女正在他們長兄的家裡吃飯喝酒的時候，

ccb.text: 有一天，约伯的儿女正在长兄家吃喝，
